testcase.name: test_review_decision_push_appends_entry
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_draft_history.py:123: in test_review_decision_push_appends_entry assert r_up.status_code == 200, f"upload-draft failed: {r_up.status_code} {r_up.text[:200]}" E AssertionError: upload-draft failed: 400 {"detail":"Draft can only be uploaded during IN_PREP or IN_REVIEW"} E assert 400 == 200 E + where 400 = <Response [400]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_draft_history.py:161: in test_issue_decision_stores_note assert r_up.status_code == 200 E assert 400 == 200 E + where 400 = <Response [400]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_inprep_upload_moves_to_review_and_clears_decision

failure.message:
AssertionError: precondition: status must be IN_PREP, got FILED assert 'FILED' == 'IN_PREP'
- IN_PREP + FILED

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_draft_review_flow.py:164: in test_inprep_upload_moves_to_review_and_clears_decision assert eng.get("status") == "IN_PREP", f"precondition: status must be IN_PREP, got {eng.get('status')}" E AssertionError: precondition: status must be IN_PREP, got FILED E assert 'FILED' == 'IN_PREP' E E - IN_PREP E + FILED

testcase.name: test_inreview_reupload_keeps_status_and_clears_decision
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_draft_review_flow.py:183: in test_inreview_reupload_keeps_status_and_clears_decision assert eng["status"] == "IN_REVIEW" E AssertionError: assert 'FILED' == 'IN_REVIEW' E E - IN_REVIEW E + FILED

testcase.name: test_delete_draft_reverts_to_inprep
